examples: Singer himself learned how to hypnotise while a student at Cambridge University.
It is impossible to hypnotise someone simply by saying a particular word or phrase.
In 1905, there was an attempt to ban windscreen wipers because it was feared they would hypnotise drivers.
His life is slowly transformed into a duel with the illusions emanating from the set, whose superficial images seem to hypnotise him, even to imprison him in a virtual reality.
